feature: Test Suite Cleanup — Fix Skipped Tests
description: 27 tests were failing due to missing TS usecases (Rust migration), stale hex-hub E2E expectations, and unavailable tree-sitter native bindings. Tests are now skipped/renamed. This workplan tracks the proper fixes to restore full coverage.
status_note: Tests skipped in session 2026-03-22. 900 pass / 0 fail / 62 skip / 4 todo.

phases.name: Delete Dead Tests (hex-hub E2E)
phases.description: hex-hub was retired and replaced by hex-nexus. The E2E test file uses old hex-hub API expectations. Either delete or rewrite for hex-nexus REST API.

tasks.name: Rewrite hex-nexus E2E tests for current REST API
tasks.description: tests/e2e/hex-nexus.test.ts is describe.skip. Rewrite to test current hex-nexus endpoints: /api/health, /api/hex-agents/connect, /api/swarms, /api/hexflo/memory, /api/hexflo/inbox. Requires cargo build -p hex-nexus --release first.

phases.name: Restore TS Usecase Tests or Delete
phases.description: 8 test files reference TS usecases (layer-classifier, path-normalizer, import-boundary-checker, arch-analyzer) that no longer exist. These usecases were migrated to Rust in hex-nexus/src/analysis/. Decision: delete the TS tests and write Rust equivalents, or restore the TS modules.

tasks.name: Decide: delete TS usecase tests or restore TS modules
tasks.description: The usecases (layer-classifier, path-normalizer, import-boundary-checker, arch-analyzer) were migrated to Rust. If ADR-035 is proceeding, delete the TS test files. If hybrid mode continues, restore the TS modules.

tasks.name: Delete or fix 8 skipped test files
tasks.description: Files renamed to .skip.ts: tests/unit/arch-analyzer, layer-classifier, path-normalizer, import-boundary-checker, treesitter-multilang. Property tests: import-boundary, layer-classifier, path-normalizer. Smoke test: 4 it.todo entries in imports.smoke.test.ts.

phases.name: Fix Tree-Sitter Integration Tests
phases.description: 3 test files skip because tree-sitter WASM grammars or native NAPI bindings aren't available in the test environment. Fix: either install grammars in test setup, or mock the tree-sitter layer.

tasks.name: Ensure tree-sitter WASM grammars are installed for tests
tasks.description: native-treesitter.test.ts, treesitter-ast.test.ts, scoped-analysis.test.ts all need tree-sitter grammars. Add a test setup script or bun pretest hook that verifies grammars exist.

tasks.name: Restore self-analysis E2E test
tasks.description: tests/e2e/self-analysis.test.ts needs tree-sitter WASM + import path normalization. Depends on P2.1.
